publishedAbstract: - noobaa operator failing to reconcile any of the cephobjectstoreusers. ~~~ 2023-05-16T19:32:59.329941141Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=info msg="❌ Not Found: BackingStore \"noobaa-default-backing-store\"\n" 2023-05-16T19:32:59.329941141Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=info msg="CephObjectStoreUser \"noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user\" created. Creating default backing store on ceph objectstore" func=ReconcileDefaultBackingStore sys=openshift-storage/noobaa 2023-05-16T19:32:59.332909486Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=info msg="✅ Exists: \"noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user\"\n" 2023-05-16T19:32:59.332909486Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=info msg="Ceph objectstore user \"noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user\" is not ready. retry on next reconcile.." sys=openshift-storage/noobaa 2023-05-16T19:32:59.332909486Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=info msg="SetPhase: temporary error during phase \"Configuring\"" sys=openshift-storage/noobaa 2023-05-16T19:32:59.332933814Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=warning msg="⏳ Temporary Error: Ceph objectstore user \"noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user\" is not ready" sys=openshift-storage/noobaa 2023-05-16T19:32:59.340397150Z time="2023-05-16T19:32:59Z" level=info msg="UpdateStatus: Done generation 2" sys=openshift-storage/noobaa 2023-05-16T19:33:00.729422186Z time="2023-05-16T19:33:00Z" level=info msg="RPC: Ping (0xc00288a9c0) ReconnectDelay:3s cancelPings:0x5ed980}" ~~~- We see the InvalidAccessKeyIds in operator logs. ~~~ # rook-operator logs: 2023-05-17 11:16:48.186062 I | ceph-object-store-user-controller: CephObjectStore "ocs-storagecluster-cephobjectstore" found 2023-05-17 11:16:48.811172 I | ceph-object-store-user-controller: creating ceph object publishedTitle: noobaa/rook-ceph operator failing to reconcile any of the cephobjectstoreusers.
